articles.title: Peru Extends Halt on Anchovy Fishing as El Niño Threat Looms
articles.summary: Peru has extended a halt on anchovy fishing due to a warming of the Pacific waters off the country’s coast, as the threat of a weather-roiling El Niño looms.

articles.title: Google Engineer Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket

articles.title: US Bonds’ Return to Pre-War Calm Fuels Bets It’ll Be Short-Lived

articles.title: Stock Rally Falters on Conflicting US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Wall Street traders left stocks wavering amid mixed signals about prospects for a deal to end the war in Iran and revive energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Gold Declines as Middle East Risks Reinforce Higher Rates Bets
articles.summary: Gold fell for a second day as concerns that continued conflict in the Middle East will prolong inflation and keep borrowing costs elevated outweighed prospects of a US-Iran peace deal.
